title: PinRogue
description:
Welcome to PinRogue, a pinball roguelike where physics, strategy and chaos collide. Launch your ball, build up points and multiplier by hitting bumpers, score satisfying combos, purchase powerful upgrades in the shop and create game-breaking builds!

Each level will have you rushing to meet the score goal before the time runs out. Use the flippers to get a powerful launch and your midair dash for additional manoeuvrability. Collide with different bumpers to build up score, multiplier and momentum.

Spend your hard-earned tickets in the shops in between levels. Combine powerful upgrades and unique balls to reach a higher score than last time, or compete with your friends for first place on the leaderboard!

• Large semi-procedural levels

• Over 50 unique upgrades

• Infinite build variety

• Many powerful balls

• 5 difficulty stages

• Daily Run
description_short: PinRogue is a pinball roguelike. Build up points and multiplier by hitting bumpers, score satisfying combos, purchase powerful upgrades in the shop and create game-breaking builds!
